Faculty of  2024–2025 Academic Year Wednesday Lectures

We are pleased to welcome Dr. Osman Gazi Güçlütürk, Assistant Professor at Galatasaray University’s Faculty of Law, to the KHas Faculty of Law Wednesday Lectures on Wednesday, February 19, 2025, at 3:00 PM, to present his paper titled “Artificial Intelligence and the Paradigm of Law: Global Trends and National Implications.” We are honored to have you join us for this conference, which is open to everyone and will be held via Teams.
